_schema: Upcoming events shown in the site's Upcoming Events tab, as a flat list (not keyed by URL, since these are announced events rather than scraped tournaments). Each entry needs `date` (YYYY-MM-DD) and `link` at minimum; `city`/`state`/`location` (venue) and `name` are optional but should be filled in for a real listing. `image` (optional) is a logo URL rendered in the right 2/5 of the card -- omit it and the card stays full-width text. `color` (optional) is an "H, S%, L%" hue triple (e.g. "205, 80%, 55%") the card derives its background/border/date-color from; omit to use the default amber. Events whose `date` has already passed are dropped automatically at generation time -- no manual cleanup needed after an event happens.
